# chore(sync): populate BUILD with global coc artifacts from loom

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `d262e3fd721d` — chore(sync): populate BUILD with global coc artifacts from loom

**Body**:

Initial sync-to-build from loom/. kailash-prism now has the full BUILD
repo artifact set including:

- 26 rules (specs-authority, artifact-flow, zero-tolerance, etc.)
- 23 commands (full COC phase set + release, sync, cc-audit, design,
  i-audit/polish/harden, validate, deploy, etc.)
- 14 agents (analyst, reviewer, security-reviewer, tdd-implementer,
  testing-specialist, frontend specialists, etc.)
- 43 guides (co-setup, deterministic-quality, claude-code,
  model-optimization)
- 16 skills (frontend-integration, flutter-patterns, spec-compliance,
  co-reference, gold-standards, testing-strategies, etc.)

Most critically: rules/specs-authority.md + guides/co-setup/09-proposal-protocol.md
give prism the handbook specs instructions for domain truth management.

SDK-specific content (dataflow, nexus, kaizen, mcp, ml, align) not
synced — prism is a frontend composable engine, not an SDK.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
